name: Sourdough Pecan Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, measure out 2 cups sourdough starter.
2. Add 2 beaten eggs, 1/2 cup cooking oil, and 1/2 cup milk to the bowl with the sourdough starter. Beat well until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon baking soda, 1 teaspoon grated orange peel, and 1 tablespoon sugar.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the sourdough mixture all at once. Beat just until blended.
5. Spread the batter onto lightly greased, preheated waffle grates.
6. Sprinkle with 1/3 cup pecans (mixed into the batter).
7. Cook for 5 to 6 minutes.
